Share opportunities, events, and resources with your students.

Create New Bulletin

Use Posts for announcements, events, trainings, and opportunities.
1 · Pick a category 2 · Write it simply 3 · Preview
Form Completion
0%
💡

Quick Resource Posting

Use Resources for important links students may need again later.

Examples: immigration help, jobs, housing, clinics, legal aid.

Basic Information

📋

Basic Information

These fields are mandatory for all bulletins

Keep it short and clear. This is what students will see first.
Highlight key details with the toolbar — use When and Where labels so students can scan quickly.
Select your name so students know who to contact.
Choose the topic students use to find this post. For permanent links, use Resources.
Add a website or registration link for more information.

Make it visual

A flyer is the first thing students notice on the board.

Recommended
Drop flyer here
PNG, JPG, or PDF · max 10MB
📄
Optional — students can open the full document from your post.
Shown when students switch to Español (ES). English flyer is used if blank.
Upload Spanish flyer
PNG or JPG · max 10MB
ES

Resource Details

Keep this simple: paste the link, name it clearly, and publish.

Use short, familiar words students will recognize quickly.
Recommended for bilingual display. If left blank, English will be reused.
Paste the website students should open when they tap the resource.
Upload organization logo
PNG or JPG (Max 10MB; auto-compressed to fit). Square logos work best.
Use the toolbar to bold key details like hours or location.
Select all languages available for this resource.
Comma-separated. Max 3 short phrases shown as scannable bullet points.
Most advisors don't need to set this. Use the Reorder button on the My Posts tab to drag resources into order instead.
Show this resource to students now

Event Details (optional)

Add each session date. Use same time for all when every session shares one schedule.
Date Start End

Spanish Translation (optional)

Shown to students when they switch to Español. Use the toolbar to highlight Cuándo and Dónde.

Contact & Location (optional)

Target Student Group (optional)

Student view

Posting Tips
  • Use a short, clear title
  • Add a flyer or image
  • Include key dates for events
  • Add a link for easy sign-up

Your recent posts will appear here.

My Posts

All content you've published.

Drag resources up or down within each category. Changes save automatically. Students see the new order right away.
